title: Atlassian Organization
description: Schema representing an Atlassian organization and its related entities including users, domains, policies, events, and groups as managed through the Atlassian Admin API.

Organization.description: Represents an Atlassian Cloud organization that serves as the top-level administrative entity for managing users, products, and policies.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

attributes.description: The core attributes of the organization.

name.description: The display name of the organization.

User.description: Represents a user account within an Atlassian organization, including their profile information, account status, and product access.

account_id.description: The unique Atlassian account identifier for the user.

account_status.description: The current lifecycle status of the account.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address associated with the user account.

picture.description: URL pointing to the user's profile picture.

nickname.description: The nickname or short name for the user.

last_active.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user was last active.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user account was created.

product_access.description: List of Atlassian products the user has access to.

ProductAccess.description: Represents a user's access to a specific Atlassian product.

key.description: The product key identifier (e.g., jira-software, confluence).

name.description: The display name of the product.

url.description: The URL of the product site instance.

last_active.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user last accessed this product.

Domain.description: Represents a verified or pending domain associated with an Atlassian organization, used for user account claiming and identity management.

id.description: The unique identifier of the domain.

attributes.description: The core attributes of the domain.

claim.description: The verification claim details for the domain.

type.description: The method used to verify domain ownership.

status.description: The current verification status of the domain.

Policy.description: Represents an organization-level policy that defines governance rules and controls for security, authentication, data residency, and access management.

id.description: The unique identifier of the policy.

name.description: The display name of the policy.

status.description: Whether the policy is currently active.

attributes.description: Policy-specific configuration settings. The structure varies by policy type.

resources.description: The resources (products, sites) this policy applies to.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the policy was created.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the policy was last modified.

PolicyResource.description: A resource that a policy applies to.

type.description: The type of resource (e.g., product, site).

Event.description: Represents an audit event that records an action performed within the Atlassian organization, used for security monitoring and compliance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the event.

attributes.description: The details of the audit event.

time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

action.description: The action that was performed (e.g., user_added, policy_updated).

context.description: Key-value pairs providing additional context about the event.

container.description: Containers (organizations, sites) related to the event.

EventActor.description: The entity (user, system, or application) that performed an action.

name.description: The display name of the actor.

type.description: The type of entity that performed the action.

self.description: API link to the actor resource.

EventLocation.description: Geographic and network location information for an event.

ip.description: The IP address from which the event originated.

geo.description: The geographic location derived from the IP address.

Group.description: Represents a group within an Atlassian organization used to organize users and assign collective permissions.

id.description: The unique identifier of the group.

attributes.description: The core attributes of the group.

name.description: The display name of the group.

description.description: A text description of the group's purpose.

member_count.description: The number of members currently in the group.

RoleAssignment.description: Represents a role granted to a user for a specific resource.

role.description: The role identifier (e.g., org-admin, trusted-user, user).

resource.description: The resource the role is scoped to.

PaginationLinks.description: Cursor-based pagination links for navigating result sets.

self.description: Link to the current page of results.

next.description: Link to the next page of results. Absent if on the last page.

prev.description: Link to the previous page of results. Absent if on the first page.
